creator: dog@virtual.org.ua
text:
I'm trying to do portupgrade x11-fm/doublecmd with the latest (revision 309199) port tree and it fails with the following error:

===>  Building for doublecmd-0.5.4_1
primary config path: /root/.lazarus
TLazPackageGraph.CheckIfCurPkgOutDirNeedsCompile  Missing state file for cmdbox 0.0: /usr/ports/x11-fm/doublecmd/work/doublecmd-0.5.4/components/CmdLine/lib/x86_64-freebsd/cmdbox.compiled
